menu.label: Catalogs
menu._note: Dynamic per-tenant catalog entries (one menu item per OR catalog object via objectStore.getCollection('catalog')) require CnAppNav `dynamicSource` support (planned, not yet landed in beta.58). Kept as a static group; the per-catalog Publication routes are still reachable via navigation.

pages.title: Dashboard
pages._note: Custom analytics dashboard (charts + recent activity + per-catalog stats). Could be type:"dashboard" with widget composition once chart widgets land.

pages.title: Catalogs
pages._note: CnIndexPage wrapper with granular show-mass-*/show-edit-action toggles disabled (app uses bespoke action handlers). Lib gap: manifest config does not expose the show-* toggles yet.

pages.title: Catalog
pages._note: CnDetailPage with bespoke header (catalog stats + slug + edit actions) + sidebar tabs. Lib gap: header-component slot resolution from manifest, granular sidebar-tab declaration.

pages.title: Publications
pages._note: Per-catalog publications list with catalog-slug filter from route param + bespoke action handlers. Lib gap: route-param-to-config-filter binding ("@route.catalogSlug").

pages.title: Publication
pages._note: Publication detail with attachment/file management + workflow status. Lib gap: file-management widget.

pages.title: Search
pages._note: Search-specific results view with facet sidebar + cross-schema match. Lib gap: type:"search" page type.

pages.title: Organizations
pages._note: CnIndexPage wrapper with show-* action toggles + custom isAdmin permission. Same lib gap as CatalogiIndex.

pages.title: Themes
pages._note: CnIndexPage wrapper with show-* action toggles + custom add behaviour. Same lib gap as CatalogiIndex.

pages.title: Theme
pages._note: Theme detail with stylesheet preview + colour picker. Lib gap: theme-preview widget.

pages.title: Glossary
pages._note: CnIndexPage wrapper with show-* action toggles + alphabetical grouping. Lib gap: alphabetical-grouping in index config.

pages.title: Glossary term
pages._note: Glossary-term detail with related-terms graph. Lib gap: related-terms widget.

pages.title: Pages
pages._note: CnIndexPage wrapper with show-* action toggles + tree-display hint. Lib gap: hierarchical index display.

pages.title: Page
pages._note: Page detail with markdown editor + slug routing. Lib gap: markdown widget + route-binding.

pages.title: Menus
pages._note: CnIndexPage wrapper with show-* action toggles. Same lib gap as CatalogiIndex.

pages.title: Menu
pages._note: Menu detail with nested item editor (drag-drop reorder). Lib gap: tree-editor widget.

pages.title: Directory
pages._note: Federated-directory list (federation discovery + per-node availability). Lib gap: federation-status widget.
